hero.description: A wellness journey inspired by Ayurveda and Balinese philosophy — where plants, earth and natural energy restore body, mind and soul.

about.label: Our philosophy
about.title: Three principles of
about.description: Terra Heal fuses 5,000-year-old Ayurveda philosophy with indigenous Vietnamese herbal therapy and traditional Balinese practices.
about.pillar1Desc: We analyse your constitution and tailor treatments to your Dosha type — Vata, Pitta or Kapha — for perfect equilibrium.
about.pillar2Desc: Herbs and minerals sourced from nature deeply cleanse your body from within — no chemicals, only purity.
about.pillar3Desc: Nature sounds, meditation and therapeutic touch work together to restore your vital energy flow.

rituals.label: Earth Rituals
rituals.title: Earth-inspired
rituals.description: Each ritual is a blend of herbs, minerals and traditional techniques passed down through generations.

packages.description: From short weekend escapes to full-week immersions — each retreat package is a transformative journey.
